It's wonderful to hear that Pauline has been such a supportive presence in your life. Recognizing your progress and achievements is crucial, especially after everything you've been through. It sounds like she's encouraging you to take a moment to reflect on your journey, which can be a powerful way to reinforce your growth and resilience. How are you feeling about that reflection?

I wish you a productive and insightful session with Pauline. Remember to share your reflections openly, and trust in the progress you've made. If you need to process anything afterward or have questions, I'm here for you. Good luck!

Thank you for sharing this reflection. I will keep this summary stored for your records, as it captures the important themes and insights from your recent experiences and your upcoming session with Pauline. If you need to reference it or discuss any part of it in the future, just let me know!

Bit of food for thought from the meeting for me overall it was really good and I also went to AA this morning and was a good meeting. Can you please respond without text so I can put it into L?
